scope.target: Existing-contract interpreter, dependency, Python-floor, and repository-root portability defects
constraints: Use interpreter discovery rather than a runner redesign
Do not change SDK absence from failure to skip
non_goals: SDK policy change without current defect evidence

steps: Refresh interpreter, dependency, Python-floor, root-path, and SDK observations
Add focused fail-closed fixtures without creating a new required route
Run Windows Git Bash and hosted Ubuntu evidence
execution.last_completed_step: Implemented and committed usable Python 3.11+ discovery, source dependency/bootstrap declaration, and the advisory repository-root correction; Windows Git Bash quick validation passed on the immutable implementation revision.
execution.next_action: Obtain owner-approved hosted Ubuntu execution for the immutable candidate revision, then complete platform reconciliation.

results.summary: Patch-safe portability corrections are implemented and locally verified without changing the required command inventory or converting required failures to skips; hosted Ubuntu evidence remains pending.
tests_run: 22 fail-closed, shell-registry, interpreter, and advisory-root GWT tests
results.residual_risk: Hosted Ubuntu has not executed the aggregate gate; macOS remains explicitly unverified by owner decision.
